columns.name: ActionSource
columns.description: The source of the label action.

columns.name: ActionSourceDetail
columns.description: More details about the source of the label action.

columns.name: AppAccessContext
columns.description: The application context for the user or service principal that performed the action.

columns.name: Application
columns.description: The application that where the activity happened.

columns.name: ApplicationMode
columns.description: The label application mode, how the label was applied.

columns.name: AutoSensitivityLabelPolicyInfo
columns.description: Auto Sensitivity Label Policy Info

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: ClientIP
columns.description: The IP address of the device that was used when the activity was logged. The IP address is displayed in either an IPv4 or IPv6 address format.

columns.name: Common
columns.description: Azure Information Protection - common event data.

columns.name: ConditionMatch
columns.description: The condition match that triggered the auto labeling.

columns.name: ContentType
columns.description: Content type.

columns.name: CorrelationId
columns.description: Correlation ID.

columns.name: CurrentProtectionType
columns.description: Current protection event information.

columns.name: CurrentProtectionTypeName
columns.description: The type of protection applied.

columns.name: DataState
columns.description: Azure Information Protection - data state.

columns.name: DeviceName
columns.description: The device on which the activity happened.

columns.name: EmailInfo
columns.description: The information required when the internalTarget is an email.

columns.name: ExchangeMetaData
columns.description: Exchange auto labeling metadata.

columns.name: ExecutionRuleId
columns.description: The ID of the rule that was executed.

columns.name: ExecutionRuleName
columns.description: The name of the rule that was executed.

columns.name: ExecutionRuleVersion
columns.description: The version of the rule that was executed.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier of an audit record.

columns.name: IrmContentId
columns.description: The unique ID used for identifying the encrypted document after the operation is complete.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: IsViewableByExternalUsers
columns.description: Is viewable by external users.

columns.name: ItemCreationTime
columns.description: The date and time the item was created.

columns.name: ItemLastModifiedTime
columns.description: The date and time the item was last modified.

columns.name: ItemName
columns.description: The item name.

columns.name: ItemSize
columns.description: The item size.

columns.name: JustificationText
columns.description: The justification to be provided, when configured by the admin in the sensitivity label policy, only when the sensitivity label is downgraded or removed by the user.

columns.name: LabelAction
columns.description: The action applied by the label.

columns.name: LabelAppliedDateTime
columns.description: The date and time the label was applied.

columns.name: LabelEventType
columns.description: The label operation.

columns.name: LabelName
columns.description: The label name applied to the item.

columns.name: LabelVersion
columns.description: The label version applied by the auto labeling policy.

columns.name: MachineName
columns.description: The machine name.

columns.name: MgtRuleId
columns.description: Management rule ID.

columns.name: ObjectId
columns.description: For SharePoint and OneDrive for Business activity, the full path name of the file or folder accessed by the user. For Exchange admin audit logging, the name of the object that was modified by the cmdlet.

columns.name: OldSensitivityLabelId
columns.description: The identifier of the sensitivity label previously applied to the document before the operation to change/remove the label was triggered.

columns.name: OldSensitivityLabelOwnerEmail
columns.description: The email address of the owner of the old sensitivity label.

columns.name: Operation
columns.description: The name of the user or admin activity.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The GUID for your organization's Office 365 tenant. This value will always be the same for your organization, regardless of the Office 365 service in which it occurs.

columns.name: OverriddenActions
columns.description: Actions that were overridden by the rule actions.

columns.name: OverRideReason
columns.description: The reason the sensitivity label was overridden.

columns.name: OverRideType
columns.description: Override type.

columns.name: Platform
columns.description: The platform on which the activity happened.

columns.name: PolicyId
columns.description: Policy ID.

columns.name: PolicyName
columns.description: Policy name.

columns.name: PolicyVersion
columns.description: Policy version.

columns.name: PreviousProtectionType
columns.description: Previous protection event information.

columns.name: PreviousProtectionTypeName
columns.description: Previous protection type.

columns.name: ProtectionEventData
columns.description: Azure Information Protection - protection event data.

columns.name: ProtectionEventTypeName
columns.description: Protection event type name.

columns.name: Receivers
columns.description: The email addresses of the receivers.

columns.name: RecordType
columns.description: The type of operation indicated by the record.

columns.name: RecordTypeName
columns.description: The record type name.

columns.name: ResultStatus
columns.description: Indicates whether the action (specified in the Operation property) was successful or not. Possible values are Succeeded, PartiallySucceeded, or Failed. For Exchange admin activity, the value is either True or False.

columns.name: RuleActions
columns.description: Actions defined by the rules.

columns.name: RuleMode
columns.description: The current mode of the rule.

columns.name: Scope
columns.description: Was this event created by a hosted O365 service or an on-premises server.

columns.name: ScopedLocationId
columns.description: The address that triggered the policy match.

columns.name: Sender
columns.description: The email address of the sender.

columns.name: SensitiveInfoDetectionIsIncluded
columns.description: Determines if sensitive info detection is included.

columns.name: SensitiveInfoTypeData
columns.description: Azure Information Protection - sensitive information types.

columns.name: SensitivityLabelEventFailureData
columns.description: Sensitivity Label Event Failure Data

columns.name: SensitivityLabelId
columns.description: The identifier for the sensitivity label recommended, as per the policy that was matched based on the contents of the document.

columns.name: SensitivityLabelOwnerEmail
columns.description: The email address of the owner of the sensitivity label.

columns.name: SensitivityLabelPolicyId
columns.description: The identifier for the sensitivity labeling policy that was matched based on the content of the document.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: The severity of the auto label policy match.

columns.name: SharePointMetaData
columns.description: SharePoint auto labeling metadata.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TargetLocation
columns.description: The location of the document with respect to the user' device.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The date and time when the user performed the activity.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: The UPN (User Principal Name) of the user who performed the action (specified in the Operation property) that resulted in the record being logged.

columns.name: UserKey
columns.description: An alternative ID for the user identified in the UserId property. This property is populated with the passport unique ID (PUID) for events performed by users in SharePoint, OneDrive for Business, and Exchange.

columns.name: UserType
columns.description: The type of user that performed the operation.

columns.name: Workload
columns.description: The Office 365 service where the activity occurred.

columns.name: WorkLoadItemId
columns.description: The workload item id.
